# MuleSoft Amazon S3 Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (8.0) of Amazon S3 Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon S3 Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon S3 Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon S3 Connector 8.0 Additional Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-config-topics.md)
- [Amazon S3 Connector 8.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon S3 Connector 8.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon S3 Connector 8.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Amazon S3 Connector 8.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Amazon S3 Connector to Version 8.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Amazon S3 Connector 8.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/amazon-s3-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon S3 Connector 8.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-s3-connector/latest/index.md)
